3146060.name: Next Level Pioneers
3146060.description:
As part of the intergalactic Next Level Pioneers group you are visiting a vast alien world - race your competitors to make the most profit for your very own space exploration company.

Take control of an advanced SPORT ROVER and compete in different, short missions to advance yourself (and all of humanity) towards a bright future.

CooPetition - what does that even mean?

You have to work together as Next Level Pioneers. NLP is a shared venture between multiple companies, to lower the cost of space exploration for everyone involved - a rocket shared is a rocket saved.
Work together as a team of individuals who are all about to make some huge profits exploring new worlds. Reaching the NLP's team-quota will advance your mission to the next phase - however no one (except maybeeee the other players) is stopping you from following your own mission and gaining the most profit for yourself. You might also be able to negotiate some temporary alliances between yourself and a competitor - if your offer is right.

Some original unique features of NLP include:

  • Master your piloting & prospecting skills to quickly identify valuable minerals and other mysterious artifacts. NLP will always help you with the unfair advantage every now and then.
  • Explore a unique alien planet with multiple semi-randomized biomes.
  • Make your way to the top, defeat the competition (your friends) and all of that without violence or guns - just sabotage
  • Player driven missions - the "team" will "democratically" determine the next mission objective and location.
  • Unlock new parts to customize your rover's appearance and increase your equipment's capabilities for special missions.
  • Play around with fun physics driven vehicles and objects.
3146060.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
